change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
Materials/consumables for service delivery (assistive devices and physiotherapy services):

	
		Complimentary additional tools and accessories for the production of 4,370 orthopaedic aids and 39,000 rehabilitation therapy from 5 Rehabilitation Centres to ensure optimal working of their existing facilities;
	
		Necessary consumable, components, and stocks for the optimization of orthopaedic production and physiotherapy services in each Centre;
	
		For distribution of mobility aids to persons with disabilities (wheelchairs, mobility aids, canes, crutches).


	 

	Logistic means for organization of:

	
		20 sets of Rehabilitation Mobile Camps (each set of camp includes 1 Assessment, 1 Fitment and 1 follow up camp) in the remote, isolated and rural areas to increased access of people to services;
	
		Short term and formal trainings sessions, capacity building initiatives and supports for Nepali rehabilitation professionals;
	
		Organization of 80 corrective surgery services on specialized hospitals;
	
		Sensitization sessions and campaigns to raise awareness about the services, disability issues and prevention, interactive meetings, monitoring visits;
	
		60 monitoring and technical support visits, 6 CPAC meetings and 1 mid-term and 1final evaluations of the project.


	 

	Human Resources

	
		International Staff


	1 Physical Rehabilitation & sustainability Coordinator

	1 Disability Coordinator

	1 P&O Coordinator

	 

	
		Local staff


	10 Project Managers/Assistants/Logisticians

	10   P&O Qualified Technicians

	3 Qualified Physiotherapist

	1 Qualified Occupational Therapist

	 

	
		Partner Technical Staff


	13 Management Staff

	23 skilled techncial staff

	24 semi-skilled technical staff

	32 Community Workers

en.full: Strengthening the Sustainability of the Physical Rehabilitation Sector for Greater Access to Services in Nepal

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
